name: image_crop
description: Crop an image to the specified bounding box

input_path.description: Path to the source image file

output_path.description: Path where the cropped image will be saved

left.description: Left edge of the crop box in pixels

top.description: Top edge of the crop box in pixels

right.description: Right edge of the crop box in pixels

bottom.description: Bottom edge of the crop box in pixels
